title: The vector space model for scoring
text:
In Section6.2(page) we developed the notion of adocument vectorthat captures the relative importance of the terms in a document.  The representation of a set of documents as vectors in a common vector space is known as thevector space modeland is fundamental to a host of information retrieval operations ranging from scoring documents on a query, document classification and document clustering. We first develop the basic ideas underlying vector space scoring; a pivotal step in this development is the view (Section6.3.2) of queries as vectors in the same vector space as the document collection.SubsectionsDot productsQueries as vectorsComputing vector scores© 2008 Cambridge University PressThis is an automatically generated page.
